mainEntity.name: How does AEO differ from traditional SEO for New York law firms?
mainEntity.text: How does AEO differ from traditional SEO for New York law firms?

acceptedAnswer.text: AEO prioritizes structured, question-answering content and schema markup for AI visibility audits, while traditional SEO focuses on keywords and backlinks; both are essential but AEO targets ChatGPT and Google AI responses specifically for New York attorneys.[3]

suggestedAnswer.text: Traditional SEO boosts Google rankings via keywords and links, but AEO ensures citation in AI overviews by developing content around legal questions, adding schema for specialties/locations, and enhancing E-E-A-T. New York firms benefit from AEO in saturated markets, yet combining both prevents over-reliance on one channel. Opposing firms may track your optimizations.[1][3]

name: AEO vs Traditional SEO for New York Law Firms
description: AEO prioritizes structured, question-answering content and schema markup for AI visibility audits, while traditional SEO focuses on keywords and backlinks; both
